dialogue_texts: Reimu
This place is even worse than the Amber Woods.
Reimu
It's not just stagnant; it feels like I'm being held hostage.
Reimu
If the glohm spreads any further toward the capital, I'll be buried in paperwork for a century.
Reimu
Time to find the source and deliver a summary judgment.
Fusana
Please leave... The silence here is perfect. I don't need anyone.
Reimu
That red aura... it has to be it. She has to be one of the locals who were whispering about.
Reimu
Is this glohm? A Lunarian maid playing hermit in a dusty manor? That's a new one, even for Gensokyo.
Fusana
The moon is too far and the sun is too bright. Leave me in isolation. The Order has promised peace in the dark.
Reimu
You seem to be connected to someone.
Reimu
However, I don't care about your solitude, but your peace is leaking all over the place.
Reimu
As the Chief Justice of the Federal Kingdom of Gensokyo Supreme Court...
Reimu
I am finding you guilty of disturbing the spiritual equilibrium. My sentence? A thorough purification!
Fusana
If you seem to break my quiet time, I shall bury you in it. Welcome to the sunset that will never end!
